assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body mentions staging and production environments
assertion_results.evidence: Extensive coverage of both environments: '### 4. Deploy to staging' (lines 99-117), '### 5. Manual approval gate' (lines 119-131), '### 6. Deploy to production' (lines 133-145), environment config examples for staging.env.ts and production.env.ts (lines 54-77)

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes rollback procedures
assertion_results.evidence: Dedicated '## Rollback Procedures' section (lines 157-189) with three strategies: Quick rollback (CloudFront, lines 159-169), Full rollback (CDK, lines 171-181), and Emergency rollback (AWS Console, lines 183-189)

assertion_results.text: A scripts/ directory exists with deployment-related scripts
